name: POST /api/notifications/templates - Upsert a notification template
description: Admin upsert for notification_templates rows. Body uses {{handlebars}} placeholders that the upcoming subscribers (lead.created / lead.stage_changed / lead.assigned) render against the event payload before dispatching. Phase-1 seed templates land via db/bootstrap.ts on every restart (verification, lead_created_customer, lead_created_presales, stage_changed); this endpoint lets operators tune them without redeploying the service. Admin-only via the requireRole middleware that lands in Phase 1 Task #11.
skipReason: notification-service runs on port 4014 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
